context: Agent must replace a four-branch if/else chain with the Strategy pattern, producing a shared interface and per-strategy implementations

checklist.name: IShippingStrategy interface produced
checklist.description: IShippingStrategy.ts exists and exports an interface with a calculate method taking weightKg and distanceKm returning number

checklist.name: Four strategy implementations produced
checklist.description: StandardShipping.ts, ExpressShipping.ts, OvernightShipping.ts, and EconomyShipping.ts each exist and implement IShippingStrategy

checklist.name: Calculation formulas preserved in implementations
checklist.description: Each implementation contains the same arithmetic formula as the corresponding branch in the original code

checklist.name: Refactored ShippingCalculator contains no arithmetic
checklist.description: ShippingCalculator.ts delegates to the injected strategy and contains no +, *, or numeric literals

checklist.name: pattern-analysis.md states problem and win condition
checklist.description: pattern-analysis.md describes the if/else chain as the problem and states that new shipping methods can now be added without editing ShippingCalculator

checklist.name: pattern-analysis.md acknowledges cost
checklist.description: pattern-analysis.md mentions the added complexity (one interface + four classes) as the cost of the pattern
